 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) 
OMI-HEALTH-EU: it provides 2D (latitude and longitude) data of eutrophication (relative to a 
1998 to 2017 reference period). 
The document refers to these products:  
OMI_HEALTH_CHL_ATLANTIC_OCEANCOLOUR_eutrophication 
 
These data are computed using MY 1  data which provide chlorophyll concentrations from 
satellite observations. The product is published on the Copernicus Marine dissemination server 
after automatic and delayed -mode quality controls. The product is available online and 
disseminated through t he MDS. Files downloaded are in  NetCDF format and follow CF -
1.7 convention.  
 
MY data are described in detail in the corresponding Quality Information Documents (QUID):  
https://catalogue.marine.copernicus.eu/documents/QUID/CMEMS-OC-QUID-009-
111to114-121to124.pdf 
OMI
